findings.description: Polaris catalog-role-to-principal-role PUT returns 201 on first assignment, not just 200/204. P33 assign row was incomplete.
Kind cluster Calico CNI loses credentials after laptop suspend. All pod sandbox ops fail with TLS timeouts until daemonset restart.
findings.proposedRule: Restart calico-node daemonset after laptop suspend before investigating pod failures

findings.description: Shell-level ${VAR:-default} scopes env vars to recipe subshell. Make ?= pollutes all targets.
findings.proposedRule: Use shell-level defaults for recipe-scoped env vars

findings.description: Orphaned minio service (48 days old) conflicted with chart nodePort 30900. Not obvious from Helm error.
findings.proposedRule: Check for orphaned resources by creation timestamp before debugging Helm conflicts

findings.description: MinIO PVC stuck Terminating with finalizers after failed Helm upgrades. Required force-patching finalizers and cleaning up provisioner helper pods.
findings.proposedRule: Patch PVC finalizers to null when stuck Terminating
